reason: The first analyze call exceeded the 304-second command limit after writing intermediate trade CSVs but before any result JSON or gate. The fix memoizes identical in-memory input matrices within one process and suppresses the reusable monthly engine's unused 3-period bootstrap before calculating the pre-registered 14-day bootstrap exactly once. Signal, trades, return formulas, RNG seed, bootstrap definition/repetitions, outputs, costs, diagnostics, stages, and gates are unchanged.
outputs_viewed_before_fix: file names, sizes, and timestamps of partial trade CSVs only; no CSV contents or performance values
no development.json, gate, or results.json existed
